title: Add section to the Workform to drag and drop email
excerpt: It would be nice to drag and drop an email to a section of the Workform so that it appears in the comment section along with attachments in the same way that it appears when forwarding an email to the Monday board.

posts.author: pedro.diaz (Pedro Diaz Jr.)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be nice to drag and drop an email to a section of the Workform so that it appears in the comment section along with attachments in the same way that it appears when forwarding an email to the Monday board.

posts.author: DHG (Daniel Greve)
posts.cookedHtml: I agree, we need this feature as well
